experiment_design.shared_pool: M_all from Phase 0 DECLARE spec (fixed; same as P1 and DRVA)
experiment_design.joint_operator: N_label(ε) ∘ N_struct(ρ): structural log precomputed per ρ row (fixed seed per row); label noise applied per ε cell.
experiment_design.holds_reuse: ρ=0: holds_orig reused. ρ>0: holds computed once per ρ row, shared across all ε.
experiment_design.null_protocol: Doubly-null: σ_label ∘ σ_trace on L_{ε,ρ} (anchor cells only)
experiment_design.FST_gate: F(c) >= τ_F*=3.841459. τ_F* fixed from original data (top-k=183). No statistical test. No FDR correction.
experiment_design.FST_null_budget: Zero internal permutation iterations per null replicate. FST null reps are fully deterministic given the doubly-null log.

S_orig_full.description: FST top-k acceptance on original data (k=K_P1_REJECTIONS=201); ground truth for FDR_ref and Recall.

S_orig_rq2.description: FST output at (ε=0, ρ=0) using F >= τ_F*=3.841459. Jaccard_rq2=1.0 at (0,0) by construction.

config.weight_note: FST has no weights. τ_F* = χ²_{1−α_F}(df=1) fixed chi-squared critical value. Gap reflects P1 structural-axis constraints invisible to FST.

speed_optimisations_applied.S2_no_calibration_per_cell: FST is deterministic — O(m) per cell
speed_optimisations_applied.S4_null_reps_deterministic: Zero internal permutation budget per null rep
